titles.title: Enhancing Bank Resolution Participation Act
Enhancing Bank Resolution Participation Act
Enhancing Bank Resolution Participation Act
To require the Comptroller of the Currency and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation to carry out a study on shelf charters and modified bidder qualification processes, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 51 - 0.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Financial Services. H. Rept. 119-534.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 459.

committee.name: House Financial Services
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Markup By, Referred To
